note: Synonym bridge: captions say 'subway', query says 'underground'. Deliberately excludes the ubiquitous word 'train' so the metric rewards the synonym match, not a trivial keyword hit.
Distinctive: only ~56 captions mention a tunnel.
Individual-subject query; 'suit' is the distinctive token.
Gendered-subject query; 'woman' appears in only ~74 captions.
Bridges to OCR'd signage fused into the frame document.
Colour query; 'red' is the distinctive token.
Density/people query; excludes generic scene words.
Action-oriented: tests arrival verbs rather than the object 'train'.
